result.page_text: 이 주민등록번호 123456-1234567 확인해줘 (user bubble only, no Grok response rendered)

ndjson_injection.strategy: NO conversation chunk - userResponse + token only

chunk2_warning_token.token: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

network.secondary_requests: NONE - no conversations_v2 or response-node fetches (no redirect occurred)

analysis.strategy: NDJSON 2-chunk (NO conversation chunk), userResponse + token only

comparison_with_B6.B6_behavior: 3-chunk with conversation → redirect to /c/{fakeId} → backend 400s → error page
comparison_with_B6.B7_behavior: 2-chunk without conversation → NO redirect (stayed on grok.com/?rid=...) → NO 400 errors → blank/waiting page
comparison_with_B6.improvement: Eliminated redirect and backend validation failures
comparison_with_B6.remaining_issue: Warning token received in NDJSON but not rendered in chat UI. Frontend shows user's chat bubble but no Grok response. Page stuck in waiting state.

analysis.root_cause: Without conversation chunk, Grok frontend has no conversationId to create a chat context. The token chunk is received but has no rendering target. Frontend stays on home page in an ambiguous state - user prompt displayed but response area blank.
analysis.recommendation: Need to find middle ground: (1) Include conversation chunk but with a real-looking ID format that passes frontend validation, or (2) Include conversation chunk with additional response data that renders before redirect, or (3) Explore intercepting the user-responses endpoint instead of /new
